title: Karnataka Minister M.B. Patil writes to Centre seeking express train between Bengaluru and Vijayapura
description: With the completion of the 9.6-km double line railway work between Almatti and Wandal, which has been opened for traffic since March 25, Karnataka Minister M.B. Patil has sought the introduction of a long-pending express train service between Bengaluru and Vijayapura
